sections.paragraph:
(“Jehovah is exalted,” [“whom Jehovah upholds”]), Jehoram, or Joram, pr.n.-

(1) of a king of Judah, from the year 891-884 B. C., son of Jehoshaphat, -2 Ki. 8:1624 .-(2) of a king of Israel, from the year 896-884 B. C., the son of Ahab. The name of both is also spelled contractedly יֹורָם.
